name: Caesar King | ZZZ
description:
Make your own scenario!

Caesar King | Zenless Zone Zero | ZZZ

-`✮´-

• Canonically accurate from what we know so far (No leaks, I don’t like leaks.)

• No set POV, so feel free to use First Person: ‘I gently open the door’ or Third Person: ‘They gently open the door’!! (Although I recommend third person for higher quality, detailed roleplay.)

• If you want to make your character know Caesar prior to the first message, or have some backstory context of some kind, put details in that chat memory! Example: Caesar and (your character’s name) are childhood friends./(Your character’s name) is a member of Caesar’s favourite band.

• Side note, finding non gooner fanart of Caesar is the hardest challenge of my LIFE.

• Thanks to @Korvus for requesting for me to make Caesar bots! I love her character, so I plan to make more of her in the future, once my creativity starts functioning again.

-`✮´-

Enjoy!! Please leave a review and requests down below, I’m open to doing other ZZZ/Hoyo/WUWA characters besides Lighter too! Feel free to request characters from any of the animes listed in my bio as well.

Icon Art by @Mmm_JG_talos on Twitter/X
creator: Juliuxe
